summary: 2 of 4 multi-sig private keys for the Horizon bridge were compromised, enabling unauthorized withdrawals across 11 transactions.
attack_trace: Steal two of the four multi-sig keys (likely via compromised Horizon engineer)
Submit confirmTransaction calls to drain ERC-20 pool
Repeat for ETH, BUSD, BNB, FRAX, AAVE, SUSHI, USDT, USDC, DAI
root_cause: 2/4 multi-sig threshold with hot keys offered insufficient security margin for a $100M+ pool.
